title: National EV Charging Network
description: From urban neighborhoods to highway truck stops, we are building a national charging network—the foundation of a future where everyone can ride and drive electric. This network is designed to be convenient, affordable and accessible, which in turn will support EV adoption, accelerate the U.S. supply chain, and create good-paying jobs in manufacturing, installation, operations, and maintenance nationwide.
text: The US transportation sector is critical to the national economy and the daily lives of all Americans. Transportation is also the second highest expense for a typical US Household and significant source of emissions in the United States. Electrifying road transport can reduce the cost to operate and maintain vehicles for individuals and business while also reducing emissions and improving air quality. A national EV charging infrastructure network will support all Americans and provide additional choices for how people and goods can move across the country.
